//: Marketplace root = Claude-Kits/. One unified kit. Install: /plugin marketplace add <git-url> then /plugin install bedrock@zos → /bedrock:kit-init (+ /bedrock:enterprise-init for the governance/CI/ADR layer). 'source' resolves relative to this marketplace root (no '../').
name: zos
description: Zero One Stack — opinionated Claude Code kits for Next.js/React teams. Ships Bedrock: a Feature-Sliced Design engineering constitution with rules, agents, scaffolding skills, enterprise governance, and CI fitness functions.

plugins.name: bedrock
plugins.description: Bedrock — the Zero One Stack Next.js/React engineering kit, built on Feature-Sliced Design (FSD). One standard: constitution + rules + agents + scaffolding skills, plus enterprise governance (managed-settings, hooks, ADRs, tech-radar, Steiger/dependency-cruiser CI fitness functions, policy-as-code). kit-init installs the constitution; enterprise-init wires the governance/CI/ADR pieces.
